description_long: This object appears to be a highly distorted and abstracted representation of an adult pedestrian, with elongated and twisted limbs and body segments. The form is angular and fragmented, with sharp edges and irregular surfaces, making it difficult to discern typical human features. The lower portion suggests the presence of legs and feet, but they are misshapen and stretched in unnatural ways. The upper body and head are merged into a single, jagged mass, lacking clear anatomical detail. The surface is smooth and reflective, with a metallic sheen that catches light in various ways. Overall, the object gives the impression of a glitched or corrupted digital scan of a person.
description: A highly distorted, angular, and metallic figure resembling an abstract adult pedestrian, with twisted limbs and a reflective surface.
description_view_0: From this angle, the twisted lower limbs and the sharp, angular upper body are most visible, with the reflective surface catching the light.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the irregular, jagged extension of the legs and the lack of clear anatomical separation between body parts.
description_view_2: The back view shows the convergence of the limbs and torso into a single, angular mass, with minimal detail on the head or arms.
description_view_3: This perspective highlights the extreme distortion of the legs and the abstract, fragmented nature of the entire form.
attribute_clothing_type: indistinguishable due to extreme distortion and lack of clear garment features
attribute_posture: severely distorted, with limbs and body twisted in unnatural positions
